opportunities.title: [OSS] LuvLyrics/LuvLyricsApp: [Good First Issue] Remove low-risk @ts-ignore occurrences with proper typings
opportunities.description:
## What is this
There are low-risk @ts-ignore usages that can be replaced with proper types.

## Goal
Remove easy suppressions and improve maintainability.

## Files to edit
- src/components/SongVersionSearchModal.tsx
- src/services/AudioExtractorService.ts
- src/screens/LibraryScreen.tsx

## Steps
1. Locate suppressions and understand expected type.
2. Add type guards or interface updates.
3. Remove suppression safely.

## Testing checklist
- Lint/type checks pass.
- Manual check of affected UI interactions.

## Definition of done
- Targeted suppressions removed without runtime changes.

opportunities.title: [OSS] LuvLyrics/LuvLyricsApp: [Performance] Replace perpetual WebView polling in YouTube browser extraction flow
opportunities.description:
## What is this
Injected script in YouTube WebView uses a continuous setInterval poll every second.

## Goal
Reduce CPU/wakeups while keeping extraction reliable.

## Files to edit
- src/screens/YoutubeBrowserScreen.tsx

## Step-by-step implementation
1. Replace blind interval polling with event-driven or guarded polling lifecycle.
2. Stop extraction polling when leaving video pages.
3. Debounce extraction attempts per video ID.
4. Keep extraction error handling stable.

## Testing checklist
- Browse multiple videos continuously.
- Validate extraction still appears reliably.
- Confirm lower re

3. Remove duplicate logs and keep one concise diagnostic per event.
4. Keep error logs meaning

### Problem
Currently, the website lacks a consistent and recognizable **brand identity** through a dedicated logo, or the existing logo is not consistently used across the platform.

This affects branding, visual consistency, and overall user experience.

### Proposed Solution
Design or update the **official logo for the 100 ReactJS Projects website** and integrate it across all relevant areas of the application.

- Ensure scalability for different screen sizes

opportunities.title: [OSS] LuvLyrics/LuvLyricsApp: [Security] Remove client-side secret risk in Spotify bridge flow
opportunities.description:
## Feature to Build

`SpotifyBridgeService.ts` does not yet exist in the codebase — this issue defines the secure architecture that must be built before any Spotify integration is shipped.

## Context
If a Spotify integration is added to LuvLyrics, the Spotify OAuth client secret **must never** live in the app bundle. Open-source mobile apps ship their source publicly — any secret in the code or in a public `.env` file is a leaked secret.

## Files to create
- `src/services/SpotifyBridgeService.ts` — Spotify integration service, built from the start with a proxy-token pattern (see below)

## S
opportunities.llm_fit_note: [WEAK] Security-focused backend task with no frontend/React work, outside core expertise.

**Type:** bug

## Description

The scrolling is stuck many times in the modal. There is no need to scroll in the write field if the content in it is not big enough to require a scroll. Otherwise, anywhere else on the modal, scrolling must be enabled. Depends on where the focus of scrolling is (cursor position)

opportunities.title: [OSS] LuvLyrics/LuvLyricsApp: [Architecture] Introduce explicit database schema versioning for migrations
opportunities.description:
## What is this
Schema changes are applied via column existence checks without explicit DB versioning.

## Goal
Use deterministic versioned migrations.

## Files to edit
- src/database/db.ts
- src/database/db_migration.ts
- optional: docs/database-migrations.md

## Step-by-step implementation
1. Choose version source (PRAGMA user_version or meta table).
2. Implement ordered migration runner by version.
3. Move ad-hoc ALTER checks into versioned steps.
4. Add migration authoring rules in docs.

## Testing checklist
- Simulate old schema -> latest upgrade.
- Validate data intact after migration
